THEAPPRENTICE-PLANNED.title: Planned
THEAPPRENTICE-PLANNED.description: Unplayable. Some cards can play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAMY.title: Dreamy
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAMY.description: Dreamy cards gain 1 additional Block for each Dream created this combat.
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITOUS.title: Ambitous
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITOUS.description: Ambitous cards deal 1 additional Damage for each Ambition created this combat.
THEAPPRENTICE-EXPEND.title: Expend
